prompt.task: Load complete context for productive Claude Code development session

context_loading.analyze_task_domain: Determine task domain (AI, UI, Data, Architecture, Testing, Security, CMS, Debugging)
context_loading.select_relevant_context: Use task domain to select relevant documentation files

step.title: Load Context and Standards
step.description: Load relevant Claude role, read project standards from CLAUDE.md, and review story context files. Understand SlideHeroes architecture and patterns.

step.title: Understand Existing Patterns
step.description: Review similar implementations in SlideHeroes codebase. Identify patterns for components, server actions, database operations, AI integration, and testing.

step.title: Implement with Tests
step.description: Implement feature following SlideHeroes standards. Write tests using existing test patterns. Use enhanceAction for server actions. Follow MakerKit patterns.

step.title: Validate Against Acceptance Criteria
step.description: Test implementation against story acceptance criteria. Ensure all functionality works as specified in SlideHeroes environment.

step.title: Update Documentation
step.description: Update relevant documentation, add code comments, and document any architectural decisions. Update context files with progress.

step.title: Prepare for Review
step.description: Run linting, type checking, and tests. Create PR with clear description and context. Follow SlideHeroes commit conventions.

code_quality.use_zod: Validate all inputs with Zod schemas
code_quality.server_components: Prefer Server Components over Client Components
code_quality.rls_security: Always use Row Level Security, never bypass

slideheroes_patterns.server_actions: Wrap all server actions with enhanceAction
slideheroes_patterns.ai_integration: Use Portkey AI Gateway for all AI requests
slideheroes_patterns.file_structure: Follow existing file naming and organization patterns
slideheroes_patterns.testing: Write unit tests for logic, integration tests for workflows

step.purpose: Identify all available documentation and context files

step.description: Based on story details and technical tasks, determine:

analysis.primary_domain: AI | UI | Data | Architecture | Testing | Security | CMS | Debugging
analysis.technical_areas: Components | Server Actions | Database | API | Authentication | etc.
analysis.patterns_needed: Performance | Error Handling | State Management | etc.

step.purpose: Set appropriate mental model for development work
Understand story requirements and acceptance criteria
Understand previous technical decisions and approaches
Understand current implementation status and next steps
Understand existing SlideHeroes patterns and implementation approaches

keywords.ai_keywords: AI, generate, prompt, LLM, OpenAI, Anthropic, suggestion, completion
keywords.ui_keywords: component, React, JSX, Tailwind, CSS, responsive, accessibility, form
keywords.data_keywords: database, Supabase, query, API, endpoint, fetch, mutation, schema
keywords.auth_keywords: authentication, login, signup, session, user, permission, RLS
keywords.cms_keywords: content, Payload, collection, field, migration, admin
keywords.testing_keywords: test, unit, integration, mock, coverage, spec, TDD
keywords.performance_keywords: optimization, performance, cache, bundle, loading, speed
keywords.debug_keywords: error, bug, debug, troubleshoot, fix, issue, problem

rules.if_contains: Primary: AI, Secondary: Data (for API integration)
Primary: Security, Secondary: Data (for user management)

context_file_mapping.core_files: Always load these for any task

architecture_foundation.when: All tasks benefit from understanding system architecture

ai_domain.secondary: data/supabase-patterns.md (for API storage), architecture/performance-optimization.md (for AI cost optimization)

selection_algorithm.step1: Analyze story content for domain keywords
selection_algorithm.step5: Load secondary domain files if relevant
selection_algorithm.step6: Limit total files to 8-12 to avoid context overload

understanding.story_requirements: Can you summarize the story requirements?
understanding.acceptance_criteria: What are the key acceptance criteria?
understanding.technical_approach: What technical approach will you use?
understanding.current_progress: What is the current implementation status?
understanding.slideheroes_patterns: Which SlideHeroes patterns will you follow?

implementation_plan.next_tasks: What are the immediate next tasks?
implementation_plan.file_changes: Which files need to be modified?
implementation_plan.testing_approach: How will you validate the implementation?
